name: Potential DoS Attack on a Web Server
notes: This rule triggers when a potential Denial-of-Service attack is detected from a single source ip.
bb_references: BB: Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack match with the same Source IP
conditions_text: when BB: Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack match with the same Source IP
thresholds: when BB: Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack match with the same Source IP
TD_list: APPLY Potential DoS Attack on a Web Server on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB: Threats: HTTP Service Unavailable match at least 1 times in 10 minutes after any of BB:Threats: Potential DoS Attack match with the same Source IP
RED_list: Event name: Potential DoS Attack detected on a Web Server
Event description: Detects when a potential denial-of-service attack is detected from a single source ip.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
